about.title: About Me
about.p1Highlight: a developer who finds the thread of improvement
about.p2: While operating a long-running e-commerce platform, I worked closely with in-house teams including BackOffice and PartnerOffice. I focused on reliably managing the full user journey — from product display and ordering to payment — and designing better experiences.
about.p3: Beyond simple feature implementation, I have always aimed to understand the business context and develop in alignment with the workflow. I have particularly accumulated experience in making continuous improvements in areas that are repetitive yet critical, such as performance optimization, data efficiency, and operational stability.
about.p3Highlight: performance optimization · data efficiency · operational stability
about.p4: I believe that great services start with small details and good communication — and that's how I've practiced it.

career.title: Career
career.role: Fashion E-commerce Platform WIZWID — Operations & Feature Development
achievements: Maintained and enhanced the full user flow including orders, payments, and product display
Developed practical features for BackOffice / PartnerOffice and improved operational efficiency
PostgreSQL slow query tuning, index optimization, and elimination of redundant queries
Delivered projects including MD Reviews, WIZpay (in-house payment), and bulk Excel processing

items.title: Slow Query Optimization
items.summary: Analyzed execution plans and optimized indexes for large transaction queries on PostgreSQL
result: Improved average response time by over 90% across key pages including login, My Page, and order detail
Overall page load improvement led to reduced bounce rates and increased client satisfaction
role: Analyzed execution plans and designed index optimizations for large PostgreSQL transaction queries
Eliminated duplicate queries called repeatedly in shared modules; restricted SELECT scope to necessary data
Redesigned query logic beyond simple tuning to reflect actual business flow
Collected slow query logs using pg_stat_statements and auto_explain modules
techDetail: Detailed execution plan analysis via EXPLAIN ANALYZE, pgBadger, and DataGrip
Conducted A/B testing of query tuning in dev environment before gradual production rollout
Built long-term monitoring setup with AWS RDS Slow Query Log integrated with CloudWatch

items.title: WIZpay (In-house Payment) Development
items.summary: Provided personalized payment options by fetching registered card info via external API in real time at checkout
result: Delivered personalized payment options by real-time card info lookup via external API at checkout entry
Improved usability with auto-branched UI based on installment type and card category (debit/credit)
Ensured consistent payment UX across PC, mobile web, and app environments
Automated complex card issuer policies, reducing CS volume and manual burden on the sales team
role: Integrated external card issuer APIs and handled response data parsing
Implemented logic to dynamically compose payment options based on card conditions
Designed API integration to fetch card info at checkout and auto-reflect in UI
Implemented jQuery-based UI components (select boxes, etc.) with platform-specific event handling for PC/Mobile/App
techDetail: Designed checkout API and card issuer integration logic with Java and Spring MVC
Stored and retrieved card info and payment conditions using PostgreSQL
Dynamic rendering and user selection event handling via jQuery
Request/response handling for REST API communication and Postman-based testing
Event flow control and responsive design considering multi-device environments

items.title: MD Review Feature Development
items.summary: Restored and improved the MD review feature that was removed during a site redesign
result: Restored and improved a feature that was lost during site redesign
Built new MD review management functionality in BackOffice per sales team request
Contributed to brand promotion and conversion rate improvement via text and image-based reviews
Enabled bulk registration from BackOffice, improving operational efficiency
role: Designed the full review registration UI and data processing logic
Implemented file handling flow: upload to S3 temp bucket → copy to main bucket on submission
Developed admin UI/UX and save/retrieve API (jQuery + Spring MVC)
Integrated display module to reflect registered reviews on the front end
techDetail: Developed review registration/retrieval API with Java and Spring MVC
Implemented image upload and cross-bucket copy using AWS S3
Dynamic BackOffice UI with jQuery and JSTL
Data persistence and retrieval with PostgreSQL
Version control via Git and SourceTree; development in IntelliJ

items.title: BO/PO Usability Improvements
items.summary: Improved operational efficiency and data consistency for BackOffice/PartnerOffice users
result: Designed and implemented bulk Excel-based update feature after analyzing brand/MD change request flows
Added Excel data validation and change history logging
Designed vendor offboarding process reflecting contract expiry and partner status
Designed data model and display logic for admins to identify and manage offboarded vendors
role: Implemented Excel upload processing and data reflection logic with Java and Spring MVC
Excel file parsing and validation using Apache POI
Status value management and per-vendor offboarding flag logic with PostgreSQL
Admin UI handling and result feedback display with jQuery
Issue tracking and communication via Git, IntelliJ, and Notion
techDetail: Payment API design based on Spring MVC
